disclaimer: This list is curated for Accenture preparation based on publicly available company tags and candidate experiences. The 'Answers' are the correct LeetCode solutions. 'Relevant Options' are plausible distractors similar to what might appear in MCQ format.

questions.title: Two Sum
questions.question: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers that add up to target.
questions.answer: Use a hash map to store complements
relevant_options: Use a hash map to store complements
Use a stack to track elements

questions.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
questions.question: You are given an array prices where prices[i] is the price of a given stock on the i-th day. You want to maximize profit by choosing a single day to buy and a different day in the future to sell. Return the maximum profit.
questions.answer: Track minimum price so far and calculate max difference
relevant_options: Sort array and pick min and max
Track minimum price so far and calculate max difference
Buy at lowest, sell at highest overall

questions.title: Climbing Stairs
questions.question: You are climbing a staircase. It takes n steps to reach the top. Each time you can either climb 1 or 2 steps. In how many distinct ways can you climb to the top?
questions.answer: Fibonacci-like DP: dp[i] = dp[i-1] + dp[i-2]

questions.title: Valid Parentheses
questions.question: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid. An input string is valid if open brackets are closed in the correct order.
questions.answer: Use a stack; push opens, pop and match for closes
relevant_options: Count number of each bracket type
Use a stack; push opens, pop and match for closes
Check if string length is even

questions.title: Maximum Subarray (Kadane's Algorithm)
questions.question: Given an integer array nums, find the contiguous subarray (containing at least one number) which has the largest sum and return its sum.
questions.answer: Kadane's algorithm: track current sum and max sum, reset if negative

questions.title: Contains Duplicate
questions.question: Given an integer array nums, return true if any value appears at least twice in the array, and false if every element is distinct.
questions.answer: Use a hash set; if element already exists, return true
relevant_options: Use a hash set; if element already exists, return true
Check if length equals unique count

questions.title: Product of Array Except Self
questions.question: Given an integer array nums, return an array answer such that answer[i] is equal to the product of all the elements of nums except nums[i]. You must write an algorithm that runs in O(n) time and without using division.
questions.answer: Compute prefix products and suffix products separately
relevant_options: Divide total product by each element
Compute prefix products and suffix products separately
Sort and multiply all except current

questions.title: Majority Element
questions.question: Given an array nums of size n, return the majority element (the element that appears more than ⌊n/2⌋ times).
questions.answer: Boyer-Moore Voting Algorithm

questions.title: Roman to Integer
questions.question: Given a roman numeral, convert it to an integer. Roman numerals are represented by combinations of I, V, X, L, C, D, M.
questions.answer: Iterate from left to right; add value unless smaller precedes larger (subtract)
relevant_options: Iterate from left to right; add value unless smaller precedes larger
Use switch case for each character

questions.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
questions.question: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
questions.answer: Sliding window with two pointers and a hash set
relevant_options: Sliding window with two pointers and a hash set

questions.title: Happy Number
questions.question: Write an algorithm to determine if a number n is happy. A happy number is one where replacing it with the sum of squares of its digits repeatedly leads to 1.
questions.answer: Use Floyd's cycle detection (hare and tortoise)
relevant_options: Use a hash set to detect cycles
Check if sum equals original number

questions.title: Rotate Array
questions.question: Given an integer array nums, rotate the array to the right by k steps, where k is non-negative.
questions.answer: Reverse entire array, then reverse first k, then reverse remaining
relevant_options: Reverse entire array, then reverse first k, then reverse remaining

questions.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
questions.question: You are given the heads of two sorted linked lists. Merge the two lists into one sorted list and return the head.
questions.answer: Iterate through both, always pick the smaller value node
relevant_options: Iterate through both, always pick the smaller value

questions.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
questions.question: Given the root of a binary tree, return its maximum depth (the number of nodes along the longest path from root to farthest leaf).
questions.answer: Recursively compute 1 + max(leftDepth, rightDepth)

questions.title: Invert Binary Tree
questions.question: Given the root of a binary tree, invert the tree (swap left and right children for every node) and return its root.
questions.answer: Recursively swap left and right children for each node
relevant_options: Recursively swap left and right children for each node

questions.title: Valid Palindrome
questions.question: Given a string s, determine if it is a palindrome, considering only alphanumeric characters and ignoring cases.
questions.answer: Use two pointers from start and end, skip non-alphanumeric
relevant_options: Use two pointers from start and end, skip non-alphanumeric

questions.title: Single Number
questions.question: Given a non-empty array of integers, every element appears twice except for one. Find that single one (linear runtime, constant space).
questions.answer: XOR all elements together (a XOR a = 0)

questions.title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
questions.question: Given a sorted array nums, remove duplicates in-place so each unique element appears once and return the new length.
questions.answer: Use slow pointer for unique elements, fast pointer to iterate
relevant_options: Create new set and copy back
Use slow pointer for unique, fast pointer to iterate
Shift elements left when duplicate found

questions.title: Merge Sorted Array
questions.question: You are given two integer arrays nums1 and nums2, sorted in non-decreasing order, and two integers m and n representing number of elements in each. Merge into nums1 (size m+n).
questions.answer: Start from the end: compare largest elements and place at end of nums1
relevant_options: Start from the end: compare largest and place at back
Insert nums2 into nums1 and shift

questions.title: Reverse Linked List
questions.question: Given the head of a singly linked list, reverse the list and return its head.
questions.answer: Iterative: maintain prev, current, next pointers
relevant_options: Store values in array and reassign

questions.title: Linked List Cycle
questions.question: Given head of a linked list, determine if the linked list has a cycle in it.
questions.answer: Floyd's cycle detection (fast and slow pointers)

questions.title: Valid Anagram
questions.question: Given two strings s and t, return true if t is an anagram of s (same letters, different order).
questions.answer: Count characters in both strings and compare
relevant_options: Count characters in both and compare
Use hash map for first string, subtract for second

questions.title: Binary Search
questions.question: Given a sorted array nums and a target value, return its index. If not found, return -1.
questions.answer: Maintain left and right pointers, adjust based on mid comparison
relevant_options: Maintain left and right, adjust based on mid

questions.title: Search Insert Position
questions.question: Given sorted array and target, return index if found; else return where it would be inserted.
questions.answer: Binary search; return left pointer at the end
relevant_options: Find first element greater than target

questions.title: Plus One
questions.question: You are given a large integer represented as digits array. Add one to the integer and return the resulting array.
questions.answer: Traverse from end, add 1, propagate carry; if first digit becomes 0, insert 1 at front
relevant_options: Convert to integer, add one, convert back
Traverse from end, add 1, propagate carry

questions.title: Palindrome Number
questions.question: Given an integer x, return true if it is a palindrome (reads same backward as forward).
questions.answer: Negative numbers false; reverse half the number and compare
relevant_options: Reverse half the number and compare

questions.title: Count Odd Numbers in an Interval Range
questions.question: Given two non-negative integers low and high, return the count of odd numbers between low and high (inclusive).
questions.answer: ((high + 1) // 2) - (low // 2) or ((high - low) // 2 + (1 if low%2==1 or high%2==1 else 0))

questions.title: Reverse Integer
questions.question: Given a signed 32-bit integer x, return its digits reversed. If reversing causes overflow, return 0.
questions.answer: Pop digits and build reversed, check overflow before multiplying
relevant_options: Pop digits and build with overflow check

questions.title: Fizz Buzz
questions.question: Given integer n, return string array where for i=1 to n: 'FizzBuzz' if divisible by 3 and 5, 'Fizz' if by 3, 'Buzz' if by 5, else i as string.
questions.answer: Loop and check divisibility conditions in order

questions.title: Power of Two
questions.question: Given an integer n, return true if it is a power of two.

questions.title: Missing Number
questions.question: Given array nums containing n distinct numbers from 0 to n, find the missing number.
questions.answer: Sum of 0..n minus sum of nums, or XOR all indices and values

questions.title: Move Zeroes
questions.question: Given an integer array nums, move all zeroes to the end while maintaining relative order of non-zero elements (in-place).
questions.answer: Use pointer for next non-zero position; swap when non-zero found
relevant_options: Count zeros and create new array
Use pointer for next non-zero position

questions.title: House Robber
questions.question: Given integer array nums representing money in each house, you cannot rob adjacent houses. Return maximum you can rob.
questions.answer: DP: rob[i] = max(rob[i-1], rob[i-2] + nums[i])

questions.title: Number of 1 Bits
questions.question: Write a function that takes an unsigned integer and returns the number of '1' bits (Hamming weight).
questions.answer: n & (n-1) trick clears lowest set bit; count iterations
relevant_options: Convert to binary string and count

questions.title: Reverse String
questions.question: Write a function that reverses a string in-place (character array).
questions.answer: Use two pointers: swap characters at left and right, move inward
relevant_options: Use two pointers to swap in-place

questions.title: First Unique Character in a String
questions.question: Given string s, find the first non-repeating character and return its index. If none, return -1.
questions.answer: Count frequencies in first pass; second pass finds first with count 1

questions.title: Find the Index of the First Occurrence in a String
questions.question: Given two strings needle and haystack, return index of first occurrence of needle in haystack, or -1 if not present.
questions.answer: Slide window of length needle over haystack and compare

questions.title: Length of Last Word
questions.question: Given string s consisting of words and spaces, return the length of the last word.
questions.answer: Trim trailing spaces, then count from end until space
relevant_options: Split by spaces and take last

questions.title: Sqrt(x)
questions.question: Given non-negative integer x, return the square root rounded down to nearest integer.
questions.answer: Binary search between 0 and x

questions.title: Climbing Stairs (already asked but popular)
questions.question: You are climbing a staircase with n steps. Each time you can climb 1 or 2 steps. How many distinct ways to reach the top?
questions.answer: Base cases: f(1)=1, f(2)=2; f(n)=f(n-1)+f(n-2)

questions.title: Symmetric Tree
questions.question: Given the root of a binary tree, check whether it's symmetric around its center.
questions.answer: Recursively compare left.left with right.right and left.right with right.left
relevant_options: Check that left subtree equals reversed right

questions.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II
questions.question: You can complete as many transactions as you like (buy/sell multiple times). Find maximum profit.
questions.answer: Sum all positive differences between consecutive days

questions.title: Integer Break
questions.question: Given an integer n, break it into sum of k positive integers (k>=2) to maximize product.
questions.answer: For n>3, maximize by using threes and possibly a two or four
relevant_options: Math: multiply by 3 as much as possible

questions.title: Perfect Squares
questions.question: Given integer n, return least number of perfect square numbers (1,4,9,...) that sum to n.
questions.answer: DP: dp[i] = min(dp[i-j*j]) + 1; or BFS / Lagrange's four-square theorem

questions.title: Find Peak Element
questions.question: A peak element is strictly greater than neighbors. Find any peak in O(log n).
questions.answer: Binary search: if mid < mid+1, peak on right; else peak on left

questions.title: Remove Element
questions.question: Remove all occurrences of val in-place and return new length.
questions.answer: Two pointers: one for position, one to iterate; copy when not val
relevant_options: Swap val with end and pop

questions.title: Excel Sheet Column Number
questions.question: Given column title 'A'=1, 'Z'=26, 'AA'=27, return column number.
questions.answer: result = result*26 + (c - 'A' + 1)
relevant_options: Multiply previous by 26 and add current value

questions.title: Nim Game
questions.question: Two players remove 1-3 stones each turn; player who takes last wins. Return True if you can win with optimal play.
questions.answer: False if n % 4 == 0; else True

questions.title: Reshape the Matrix
questions.question: Reshape an m x n matrix into r x c (same total elements). Return original if impossible.
questions.answer: Flatten to 1D and fill new matrix row by row

questions.title: Pascal's Triangle
questions.question: Given numRows, generate Pascal's triangle.
questions.answer: Each row starts/ends with 1; inner values = above left + above right

questions.title: Implement strStr()
questions.question: Return index of first occurrence of needle in haystack, or -1.
questions.answer: Edge cases: empty needle returns 0; slide window and compare

questions.title: Subtree of Another Tree
questions.question: Given roots of two binary trees, check if second tree is a subtree of first.
questions.answer: Serialize both and check substring; or recursive compare with isIdentical
relevant_options: Check at each node with isSameTree

questions.title: Backspace String Compare
questions.question: Given two strings with # representing backspace, return if final strings equal.
questions.answer: Build result using stack or two-pointer from end

questions.title: Longest Common Prefix
questions.question: Find the longest common prefix string amongst an array of strings.
questions.answer: Take first string as prefix; compare with each, shorten until match

questions.title: Implement Queue using Stacks
questions.question: Implement a first-in-first-out queue using only two stacks.
questions.answer: Use 'in' stack for push; 'out' stack for pop/peek, transferring if empty

questions.title: Isomorphic Strings
questions.question: Given two strings, determine if they're isomorphic (characters can map one-to-one).
questions.answer: Use two hash maps to track s->t and t->s mappings

questions.title: Ransom Note
questions.question: Given ransomNote and magazine, return if ransomNote can be constructed from magazine letters (each used once).
questions.answer: Count magazine letters; decrement for ransomNote; all counts non-negative

questions.title: Set Mismatch
questions.question: Set s contains numbers 1..n but one duplicate and one missing; find both.
questions.answer: Use sum and sum of squares difference; or XOR trick

questions.title: Intersection of Two Arrays
questions.question: Return an array containing intersection of two arrays (unique elements).
questions.answer: Use set for first array; iterate second to find common

questions.title: Counting Bits
questions.question: Given n, return array ans where ans[i] = number of 1 bits in i.

questions.title: Delete and Earn
questions.question: Given nums, you can take any number but earn its points and delete all nums[i]-1 and nums[i]+1. Maximize points.
questions.answer: Transform into house robber problem: count sums per value, then DP

questions.title: 3Sum
questions.question: Find all triplets in array that sum to zero (no duplicates).
questions.answer: Sort, fix first element, use two pointers for remaining

questions.title: Spiral Matrix
questions.question: Given an m x n matrix, return all elements in spiral order.
questions.answer: Track boundaries (top, bottom, left, right), shrink after each traversal

questions.title: Largest Number
questions.question: Arrange numbers to form the largest possible number (return as string).
questions.answer: Custom sort: a+b compared to b+a

questions.title: Longest Palindromic Substring
questions.question: Find the longest palindromic substring in given string.
questions.answer: Expand from centers (n*2-1 centers)

questions.title: Sort Colors (Dutch National Flag)
questions.question: Sort array with values 0,1,2 in-place (one-pass).
questions.answer: Three pointers: low, mid, high; swap 0 to front, 2 to back

questions.title: Container With Most Water
questions.question: Given heights, find two lines that together with x-axis contain most water.
questions.answer: Two pointers from ends, move shorter pointer inward

questions.title: Add Two Numbers (Linked Lists)
questions.question: Two numbers represented as reverse-linked lists, return sum list.
questions.answer: Traverse both with carry, create new nodes

questions.title: Subsets
questions.question: Return all possible subsets (power set) of array with unique elements.
questions.answer: Backtracking adding/removing; or bitmask iteration

questions.title: Word Break
questions.question: Given string s and dictionary, return if s can be segmented into dictionary words.
questions.answer: DP: dp[i] true if s[0:i] segmentable and s[j:i] in dict

questions.title: Number of Islands
questions.question: Count number of islands (connected '1's) in 2D grid.
questions.answer: DFS/BFS on each unvisited '1', marking visited

questions.title: Coin Change
questions.question: Given coin denominations and amount, return fewest coins needed (or -1).
questions.answer: DP: dp[i] = min(dp[i-coin])+1

questions.title: Task Scheduler
questions.question: Schedule tasks with cooldown n between same tasks; return total intervals.
questions.answer: Count frequencies; max freq determines idle slots; formula (max-1)*(n+1) + count_max

questions.title: Rotting Oranges
questions.question: In grid, 0=empty,1=fresh,2=rotten. Rotten spreads to adjacent each minute. Return minutes until all rot or -1.
questions.answer: Multi-source BFS from all rotten oranges simultaneously
relevant_options: BFS queue initially with all rottens

questions.title: Course Schedule
questions.question: Given numCourses and prerequisites [a,b] (b needed for a), return if courses can be finished.
questions.answer: Detect cycle in directed graph using DFS states or Kahn's algorithm

questions.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
questions.question: Find kth largest element in unsorted array.
questions.answer: Quickselect or min-heap of size k

questions.title: LRU Cache
questions.question: Design LRU cache with get and put in O(1).
questions.answer: HashMap + Doubly Linked List

questions.title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree
questions.question: Find LCA of two nodes in binary tree (not BST).
questions.answer: Recursively search; if both sides return non-null, current is LCA

questions.title: Maximal Square
questions.question: Given binary matrix, find largest square containing only 1's (area).
questions.answer: DP: dp[i][j] = min(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1], dp[i-1][j-1]) + 1 if matrix[i][j]=='1'

questions.title: Jump Game
questions.question: You start at index 0; each element is max jump length. Determine if you can reach last index.
questions.answer: Greedy: track farthest reachable index

questions.title: Generate Parentheses
questions.question: Given n pairs, generate all valid combinations of parentheses.
questions.answer: Backtracking: add '(' if left < n, add ')' if right < left

questions.title: Remove Nth Node From End of List
questions.question: Remove nth node from end of linked list in one pass.
questions.answer: Two pointers with n gap; when fast reaches end, slow is before target

questions.title: Permutations
questions.question: Return all possible permutations of distinct integers.
questions.answer: Backtracking with used array or swapping

questions.title: Group Anagrams
questions.question: Group strings that are anagrams of each other.
questions.answer: Sort each string to use as key in hash map

questions.title: Find All Anagrams in a String
questions.question: Find all start indices of p's anagrams in s.
questions.answer: Sliding window with frequency arrays and matches count

questions.title: Unique Paths
questions.question: Robot moves right/down from top-left to bottom-right; count ways.
questions.answer: Combinations: C(m+n-2, m-1) or DP grid

questions.title: Minimum Path Sum
questions.question: Find path sum from top-left to bottom-right minimizing sum, only down/right moves.
questions.answer: DP: dp[i][j] = grid[i][j] + min(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1])

questions.title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
questions.question: Search target in rotated sorted array (no duplicates) in O(log n).
questions.answer: Modified binary search: determine which half is sorted

questions.title: Combination Sum
questions.question: Find all unique combinations summing to target (unlimited use of elements).
questions.answer: Backtracking with index to avoid duplicates, subtracting target

questions.title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
questions.question: Given digits (2-9), return all possible letter combinations from phone keypad.
questions.answer: Backtracking building string, mapping digits to letters

questions.title: Decode Ways
questions.question: Given 'A'=1 to 'Z'=26 mapping, count ways to decode digit string.

questions.title: Merge Intervals
questions.question: Merge overlapping intervals.
questions.answer: Sort by start; merge if current start <= last end

questions.title: Insert Interval
questions.question: Insert new interval into non-overlapping sorted intervals, merging if needed.
questions.answer: Add all before new, merge overlapping, add rest

questions.title: Rotate Image
questions.question: Rotate n x n matrix 90 degrees clockwise in-place.
questions.answer: Transpose then reverse each row

questions.title: Pow(x, n)
questions.question: Implement pow(x, n) with O(log n) time.
questions.answer: Fast exponentiation: binary exponent recursion

questions.title: Maximum Product Subarray
questions.question: Find contiguous subarray with largest product (can be negative).
questions.answer: Track min and max product so far due to negatives

questions.title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
questions.question: Find minimum in rotated sorted array (no duplicates).
questions.answer: Binary search: if mid > right, min in right; else in left

questions.title: House Robber II (Circular)
questions.question: Houses in circle: first and last are adjacent; cannot rob adjacent.
questions.answer: Two runs: rob[0..n-2] and rob[1..n-1], take max

questions.title: Palindrome Partitioning
questions.question: Partition string such that every substring is palindrome; return all partitions.
questions.answer: Backtracking; check palindrome with DP or two pointers

questions.title: Gas Station
questions.question: Given gas and cost arrays, return starting index to complete circuit.
questions.answer: If total gas < total cost: -1; else greedy: start when tank drops below 0

questions.title: Find Subsequence of Length K With the Largest Sum
questions.question: You are given an integer array nums and an integer k. Return the largest sum of any subsequence of length k. (Maintain original order in output - just sum matters)
questions.answer: Find top k largest elements using quickselect or sorting and sum them.
relevant_options: Use min heap of size k

questions.title: Ant on the Boundary
questions.question: An ant starts at 0 and moves according to an array of integers (positive = right, negative = left). Count how many times the ant returns to the boundary (position 0), excluding the start.
questions.answer: Simulate position, increment count each time position becomes 0 after first move.
relevant_options: Just count zeros in prefix sum array (excluding first)

questions.title: Minimum Right Shifts to Sort the Array
questions.question: Given an array, you can right shift (rotate) it. Return the minimum number of right shifts needed to sort it in non-decreasing order, or -1 if not possible.
questions.answer: Find the pivot where the array breaks the sorted order. Check if the array is a rotated sorted array. The answer is length - pivot index if it's sorted at the end.

questions.title: Maximum Area of Longest Diagonal Rectangle
questions.question: You are given a 2D array where each element is [length, width]. Return the maximum area of a rectangle that has the longest diagonal length (sqrt(l^2 + w^2)). If multiple have same diagonal, pick max area.
questions.answer: Calculate diagonal squared (l*l + w*w) for each. Keep track of max diagonal. Compare area when diagonal ties.

questions.title: Valid Mountain Array
questions.question: Given an array of integers, return true if it is a valid mountain array (strictly increasing to a peak, then strictly decreasing). Length >= 3.
questions.answer: Two pointers: climb up from left, climb down from right. They should meet at the same peak (not ends).

questions.title: Find Numbers with Even Number of Digits
questions.question: Given an array nums, return the count of numbers that have an even number of digits.
questions.answer: Check number of digits by converting to string or using log10. Count if even.
relevant_options: Convert to string and check length

questions.title: Maximum 69 Number
questions.question: You are given a positive integer consisting only of digits 6 and 9. You can change at most one digit (6->9 or 9->6). Return the maximum number you can get.
questions.answer: Change the first '6' from the left to '9'.

questions.title: Defanging an IP Address
questions.question: Given a valid IPv4 address, return a defanged version where every '.' is replaced with '[.]'.
questions.answer: Use replace function or iterate and replace.

questions.title: Jewels and Stones
questions.question: You're given strings jewels and stones. Count how many stones are also jewels (case-sensitive).
questions.answer: Put jewels in a set, count stones that are in set.

questions.title: Shuffle String
questions.question: Given a string s and an array indices that specify the new position of each character, return the shuffled string.
questions.answer: Create result char array of same length. Place s.charAt(i) at result[indices[i]].
relevant_options: Sort pairs of chars and indices
Use map of index to char

questions.title: Check If Two String Arrays are Equivalent
questions.question: Given two string arrays word1 and word2, return true if the concatenated strings are equal.
questions.answer: Concatenate using StringBuilder or join and compare.

questions.title: Maximum Nesting Depth of the Parentheses
questions.question: Given a valid parentheses string, return the maximum nesting depth.
questions.answer: Use a counter; increment on '(', decrement on ')'. Track max.

questions.title: Goal Parser Interpretation
questions.question: Interpret string where 'G' -> 'G', '()' -> 'o', '(al)' -> 'al'.
questions.answer: Replace '()' with 'o' and '(al)' with 'al'.

questions.title: Count Items Matching a Rule
questions.question: Count items in a 2D array matching rule (key: 'type','color','name').
questions.answer: Map ruleKey to index: type=0, color=1, name=2. Count items where item[index] == ruleValue.

questions.title: Subtract the Product and Sum of Digits of an Integer
questions.question: Given integer n, return product of digits minus sum of digits.
questions.answer: Extract digits using %10, compute product and sum, return diff.

questions.title: XOR Operation in an Array
questions.question: Given n and start, create array where nums[i] = start + 2*i. Return XOR of all elements.
questions.answer: Loop from 0 to n-1, XOR (start + 2*i).

questions.title: Kids With the Greatest Number of Candies
questions.question: Given candies array and extraCandies, return boolean array indicating if giving all extra to that kid makes them have max candies.
questions.answer: Find current max. For each, check if candies[i] + extraCandies >= max.

questions.title: Number of Steps to Reduce a Number to Zero
questions.question: Given integer num, steps to zero: if even divide by 2, else subtract 1.
questions.answer: Count steps in loop. Optimize: bitCount plus highestBitPosition -1.

questions.title: Decompress Run-Length Encoded List
questions.question: Given list nums where nums[2*i] = freq, nums[2*i+1] = val. Decompress into list of val repeated freq times.
questions.answer: Iterate i=0 to n step 2, add nums[i+1] repeated nums[i] times.

questions.title: Matrix Diagonal Sum
questions.question: Return sum of primary and secondary diagonal in square matrix, without double-counting center.
questions.answer: Sum primary: arr[i][i]. Sum secondary: arr[i][n-1-i]. If n odd, subtract center once.

questions.title: Find Words That Can Be Formed by Characters
questions.question: Given words and chars string, count lengths of words that can be formed using chars (each char once per word).
questions.answer: Count chars frequency. For each word, check if sufficient for each character.

questions.title: Truncate Sentence
questions.question: Truncate sentence s to first k words.
questions.answer: Split by space, take first k, join with space.

questions.title: Check if One String Swap Can Make Strings Equal
questions.question: Return true if two strings can be made equal with at most one swap (of two characters in one string).
questions.answer: Find indices where diff. Must be 0 or 2 diffs, and swapped chars equal.

questions.title: Largest Substring Between Two Equal Characters
questions.question: Find length of longest substring between two equal characters (excluding the two chars). Return -1 if none.
questions.answer: Store first occurrence of each char. For each, compute i - firstIndex - 1. Track max.

questions.title: Count the Number of Consistent Strings
questions.question: Given allowed string and array of words, count words consisting only of allowed characters.
questions.answer: Put allowed chars in set. For each word, check if all chars in set.

questions.title: Design Parking System
questions.question: Design parking system with big, medium, small slots. Add car returns true if space available.
questions.answer: Store counts for each size. Decrement on add. Return false if count zero.

questions.title: Latest Time by Replacing Hidden Digits
questions.question: Given time '?5:4?' or '2?:?3', replace '?' to get maximum valid time.
questions.answer: Greedy per position: first digit max 2, second max 3/9 based on first, minute digits 5 and 9.

questions.title: Check if a String Contains All Binary Codes of Size K
questions.question: Given binary string s and integer k, return true if all binary codes of length k appear as substrings.
questions.answer: Use rolling hash to generate all substrings of length k, store in set. Check set size == 2^k.
relevant_options: Use sliding window with boolean array

questions.title: Minimum Operations to Make the Array Increasing
questions.question: Make array strictly increasing by incrementing elements. Return minimum total increments.
questions.answer: Iterate i=1 to n-1, if nums[i] <= nums[i-1], add (nums[i-1] - nums[i] + 1) to result, set nums[i] = nums[i-1]+1.

questions.title: Can Make Arithmetic Progression From Sequence
questions.question: Check if array can be rearranged to form arithmetic progression.
questions.answer: Sort and check constant difference between consecutive elements.
relevant_options: Find min and max, check step

questions.title: Minimum Time Visiting All Points
questions.question: On 2D plane, move from point to point using Chebyshev distance (max(dx,dy)) in unit steps. Return total time.
questions.answer: For each consecutive pair, add max(|x2-x1|, |y2-y1|).

questions.title: Number of Different Integers in a String
questions.question: Extract integers from alphanumeric string (ignore leading zeros) and count distinct.
questions.answer: Split on non-digit, filter non-empty, strip leading zeros, put in set.
relevant_options: Use BigInteger to handle large numbers

questions.title: Maximum Repeating Substring
questions.question: Given sequence and word, return max k such that word repeated k times is substring of sequence.
questions.answer: Check for increasing k by building word*k and checking contains.

questions.title: Check if Numbers Are Ascending in a Sentence
questions.question: Extract numbers from sentence (as integers) and check if strictly increasing.
questions.answer: Split on space, extract tokens that are all digits, parse int, compare with previous.
relevant_options: Check if token matches digit pattern

questions.title: Sort Integers by The Number of 1 Bits
questions.question: Sort array by number of 1 bits ascending, then by value ascending.
questions.answer: Use custom comparator: Integer.bitCount(a) == Integer.bitCount(b) ? a-b : bitCount(a)-bitCount(b).
relevant_options: Use counting sort on bit counts
Use merge sort with custom compare

questions.title: Minimum Cost to Move Chips to Same Position
questions.question: Each chip at position[i]. Moving a chip costs 0 for 2 steps, 1 for 1 step. Find min cost to move all to same position.
questions.answer: Count chips at even positions and odd positions. Min cost = min(even, odd).

questions.title: Find Nearest Point That Has the Same X or Y Coordinate
questions.question: Given (x,y) and points array, find index of nearest point sharing x or y with manhattan distance. Return -1 if none.
questions.answer: Iterate points, check if x==xi or y==yi, compute |x-xi|+|y-yi|, track min with smallest index.
relevant_options: Find min distance first then index

questions.title: Calculate Digit Sum of a String
questions.question: Replace digits with their sum of digits repeatedly until length <= k.
questions.answer: While length > k, group by k, sum digits in group, build new string.

questions.title: Check if a Word Occurs as a Prefix of Any Word in a Sentence
questions.question: Return index (1-indexed) of word where searchWord is prefix, else -1.
questions.answer: Split sentence into words. For each, if word.startsWith(searchWord), return i+1.

questions.title: Number of Arithmetic Triplets
questions.question: Count triplets (i<j<k) such that nums[j] - nums[i] == diff and nums[k] - nums[j] == diff.
questions.answer: Use a boolean set for O(1) lookups. For each i, check if i+d and i+2d exist.

questions.title: Largest Positive Integer That Exists With Its Negative
questions.question: In array with positive and negative numbers, find largest k where -k also exists.
questions.answer: Use set. For each positive, check if -num exists. Track max.

questions.title: Number of Strings That Appear as Substrings in Word
questions.question: Count how many strings in patterns are substrings of word.
questions.answer: For each pattern, if word.contains(pattern) increment count.

questions.title: Check Distances Between Same Letters
questions.question: Given string s and distance array of size 26. Check if each letter appears at distance[letter] between its two occurrences.
questions.answer: Store first index of each letter. When second appears, check if i - firstIndex -1 == distance[charIndex].

questions.title: Kth Distinct String in an Array
questions.question: Find kth distinct string (strings appearing exactly once) in array order.
questions.answer: Count frequencies with map. Iterate array, maintain count of frequency-1 strings, return when count == k.
relevant_options: Two passes: collect distinct then index

questions.title: Cells in a Range on an Excel Sheet
questions.question: Return all cells in range like 'K1:L2'.
questions.answer: Parse start and end columns/rows. Nested loop: for col from startCol to endCol, row from startRow to endRow, add string.

questions.title: Number of Valid Words in a Sentence
questions.question: Count valid words: contains only lowercase, hyphens at most one, not at ends, punctuation only at end.
questions.answer: Split by spaces. Check each word against rules: count hyphens, check positions, check punctuation only at last char.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Moves to Seat Everyone
questions.question: Given seats array and students array, assign each student to a seat with min total moves (absolute difference).
questions.answer: Sort both arrays, sum absolute difference of corresponding indices.

questions.title: Maximum Product Difference Between Two Pairs
questions.question: Product difference = (largest * second largest) - (smallest * second smallest).
questions.answer: Sort array. Use last two for largest product, first two for smallest product.
relevant_options: Find top 2 and bottom 2 without full sort
Find max, second max, min, second min

questions.title: Check if All A's Appears Before All B's
questions.question: Return true if string doesn't have 'b' before 'a'.
questions.answer: Check if last index of 'a' < first index of 'b'.

questions.title: Maximum Number of Pairs in Array
questions.question: Count pairs of equal numbers, track leftovers. Return [pairs, leftovers].
questions.answer: Use frequency map. Pairs = sum(freq//2), leftovers = sum(freq%2).

questions.title: Check if String Is Decomposable Into Value-Equal Substrings
questions.question: Decompose string into substrings of length 2 where chars are same, except one substring of length 2 can be different?
questions.answer: Count pairs of equal chars. Must have all length-2 equal except maybe one.

questions.title: First Letter to Appear Twice
questions.question: Return the first character that appears at least twice.
questions.answer: Use set, return when adding duplicate.

questions.title: Check if Binary String Has at Most One Segment of Ones
questions.question: Return true if ones are contiguous in binary string.
questions.answer: Check if string contains '01' substring.

questions.title: Minimum Operations to Make Array Alternating
questions.question: Make array alternating (no two adjacent equal). Min operations changing any element.
questions.answer: For even and odd indices separately, find most frequent elements. Keep top two since they can't be same.

questions.title: Check if an Array Is Consecutive
questions.question: Return true if array can be rearranged into consecutive numbers.
questions.answer: Check max-min == n-1 and no duplicates.

questions.title: Maximum Difference Between Increasing Elements
questions.question: Max j-i where nums[j] > nums[i] and j>i. Return -1 if none.
questions.answer: Track min so far, compute diff when current > min, track max diff.

questions.title: Count Hills and Valleys in an Array
questions.question: Count hills (neighbors lower) and valleys (neighbors higher) ignoring adjacent duplicates.
questions.answer: Remove consecutive duplicates conceptually; compare with i-1 and i+1.
relevant_options: Compare with prev and next non-equal

questions.title: Maximum Sum With Exactly K Elements
questions.question: Pick k elements, each time pick largest, add to sum, then increment it by 1.
questions.answer: Sum = max*k + k*(k-1)/2 (arithmetic series).
relevant_options: Sum of top k plus increments

questions.title: Remove One Element to Make the Array Strictly Increasing
questions.question: Check if removing at most one element makes array strictly increasing.
questions.answer: Find first violation i where nums[i] >= nums[i+1]. Check if removing i or i+1 works.

questions.title: Largest 3-Same-Digit Number in String
questions.question: Find largest number with three identical consecutive digits.
questions.answer: Scan i=0 to n-3, if three same chars, track max char.

questions.title: Make Array Zero by Subtracting Equal Amounts
questions.question: In one operation, choose positive x and subtract it from all positive elements. Return min operations to zero array.
questions.answer: Count number of distinct non-zero elements.

questions.title: Maximum Ascending Subarray Sum
questions.question: Find maximum sum of contiguous ascending subarray.
questions.answer: Track current sum, reset when not ascending (nums[i] <= nums[i-1]).

questions.title: Minimum Sum of Four Digit Number After Splitting Digits
questions.question: Given four-digit number, split digits into two new numbers (preserve digit order? Actually minimize sum of two 2-digit numbers).
questions.answer: Sort digits, form numbers as digits[0]*10+digits[2] and digits[1]*10+digits[3].

questions.title: Sum of Digits of String After Convert
questions.question: Convert string to number string (a=1). Sum digits k times. Return result.
questions.answer: Convert to numeric string. While k>0: sum digits, update string, k--.

questions.title: Check if Every Row and Column Contains All Numbers
questions.question: Check if n x n matrix is valid: each row and col contains numbers 1..n exactly once.
questions.answer: For each row and col, use set to check size n and values in range.

questions.title: Find Subarrays With Equal Sum
questions.question: Check if there are two different subarrays of length 2 with equal sum.
questions.answer: Store sum of nums[i]+nums[i+1] in set. If duplicate found, return true.
relevant_options: Use map of sum to count

questions.title: Maximum Product of Two Elements in an Array
questions.question: Find max (nums[i]-1)*(nums[j]-1) for i!=j.
questions.answer: Find top two largest values. Multiply (max1-1)*(max2-1).
relevant_options: Use heap to get two largest

questions.title: Minimum Absolute Difference
questions.question: Return pairs with minimum absolute difference in sorted order.
questions.answer: Sort array, find min diff, collect pairs with that diff.
relevant_options: Use map of diff to list

questions.title: Count Number of Pairs With Absolute Difference K
questions.question: Count pairs |i-j| = K? Actually |nums[i]-nums[j]| == k.
questions.answer: Use frequency map. For each num, count num+k and num-k.

questions.title: Minimum Seconds to Equalize a Circular Array
questions.question: In circular array, each second each value spreads to neighbors. Find min seconds to make all equal.
questions.answer: For each value, track max gap between occurrences (circular). Answer = min over values of floor(max_gap/2).

questions.title: Count Equal and Divisible Pairs in an Array
questions.question: Count pairs (i<j) where nums[i]==nums[j] and i*j % k == 0.
questions.answer: Nested loops O(n^2) okay for small n. Or group indices by value, check i*j mod k.

questions.title: Find First Palindromic String in the Array
questions.question: Return first palindromic string in array, or empty string.
questions.answer: For each word, check palindrome (two pointers). Return first.

questions.title: Count Special Quadruplets
questions.question: Count quadruplets (a,b,c,d) with a+b+c == d.
questions.answer: Nested loops (i<j<k<l) O(n^4) or optimized O(n^3) or O(n^2) using map.
relevant_options: Use hash map for sums of pairs

questions.title: Check if All Characters Have Equal Number of Occurrences
questions.question: Return true if all characters in string appear same number of times.
questions.answer: Count frequencies with map, collect values to set, check size==1.

questions.title: Redistribute Characters to Make All Strings Equal
questions.question: Check if you can redistribute characters across n strings to make all equal.
questions.answer: Total count of each char must be divisible by n.

questions.title: Sorting the Sentence
questions.question: Sentence has words with numbers at end indicating original position. Restore sentence.
questions.answer: Split, create array of size max number, place word without last char at index-1, join.
relevant_options: Use map of number to word

questions.title: Decode the Message
questions.question: Decode message using key mapping: first occurrence of each letter in key maps to a-z order.
questions.answer: Build mapping dict by iterating key, assign next unused letter. Translate message.

questions.title: Check if All Integers in a Range Are Covered
questions.question: Given intervals [[l,r]] and [left,right], check if all numbers in range are covered.
questions.answer: Mark covered numbers boolean array from left to right. Check if any false.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Operations to Convert Time
questions.question: Convert current to correct time using increments of 1,5,15,60 minutes. Return min operations.
questions.answer: Convert both to minutes since 00:00, diff = correct-current. Greedy: use 60,15,5,1.

questions.title: Find the K-Beauty of a Number
questions.question: Return count of substrings of length k that divide original number.
questions.answer: Convert to string, slide window of size k, convert to int, check divisibility (non-zero).

questions.title: Maximum Number of Words You Can Type
questions.question: Given broken letters, count words that can be typed fully using non-broken letters.
questions.answer: Put broken letters in set. For each word, check if any char in set.

questions.title: Find if Path Exists in Graph
questions.question: Given n vertices and edges, check if path exists from source to destination.
questions.answer: Build adjacency list, BFS/DFS from source to destination.

questions.title: Find Center of Star Graph
questions.question: Star graph: one center connected to all leaves. Given edges, find center.
questions.answer: Center appears in every edge. Return common node in first two edges.

questions.title: Maximum Number of Balls in a Box
questions.question: Box number = sum of digits of ball number (1 to n). Find box with max balls.
questions.answer: Compute digit sum for each ball, use counting array (max sum 9*5=45).

questions.title: Reformat Date
questions.question: Convert '20th Oct 2052' to '2052-10-20'.
questions.answer: Parse day (remove st/nd/rd/th), month mapping, year.

questions.title: Check if There Is a Path With Equal Number of 0s and 1s
questions.question: From (0,0) to (m-1,n-1) can move right/down. Check if any path has equal 0s and 1s (including start/end).
questions.answer: DP with state (i,j,diff) where diff = count1 - count0. Too large? Use BFS with set.

questions.title: Design an Ordered Stream
questions.question: Insert (id, value), return list of consecutive values starting from pointer.
questions.answer: Store in array, advance pointer while next exists.

questions.title: Count Pairs of Similar Strings
questions.question: Two strings are similar if they consist of same set of characters. Count pairs.
questions.answer: Convert each string to bitmask (26 bits). Use map of mask to count. Sum count*(count-1)/2.
relevant_options: Use set of chars and compare

questions.title: Number of Times a Digit Appears in a Range
questions.question: Count digit d occurrences from 1 to n.
questions.answer: Use digit DP or mathematical formula per place.

questions.title: Count Sorted Vowel Strings
questions.question: Count strings of length n consisting only of vowels (a,e,i,o,u) in lexicographic order.
questions.answer: Stars and bars: C(n+4,4) or DP: dp[char][len].

questions.title: Check if Word Equals Summation of Two Words
questions.question: Map letters a=1,...,z=26, sum numeric values. Check if firstWord + secondWord == targetWord.
questions.answer: Convert each to integer by iterating char and sum = sum*10 + (c-'a'+1). Compare sums.

questions.title: Minimum Changes to Make Alternating Binary String
questions.question: Minimum changes to make string alternating (01 or 10 patterns).
questions.answer: Count mismatches for pattern starting with 0 and starting with 1. Return min.

questions.title: Largest Odd Number in String
questions.question: Return largest odd number that is substring (contiguous) of given numeric string.
questions.answer: Find last odd digit, return substring from start to that index.
relevant_options: Scan from end for odd digit

questions.title: Minimum Sum of Two Numbers Formed From Digits
questions.question: Distribute digits of array into two numbers to minimize sum.
questions.answer: Sort digits, assign alternately to two numbers (like greedy by placing smallest in tens place as possible).
relevant_options: Put smallest digits in highest place

questions.title: Replace All Digits with Characters
questions.question: String alternates letter-digit. Replace digit with shift of previous letter (digit value).
questions.answer: Iterate, if digit, newChar = prevChar + digitValue.

questions.title: Maximum Value of a String in an Array
questions.question: Value = length if contains letters, else integer value. Return max.
questions.answer: If string contains non-digit, value = length; else parse int. Return max.

questions.title: Count Prefixes of a Given String
questions.question: Count words that are prefixes of given string s.
questions.answer: For each word, if s.startsWith(word), count++.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Chairs in a Waiting Room
questions.question: String has 'E' entry, 'L' leave. Track simultaneous people, return max.
questions.answer: Count increment on 'E', decrement on 'L', track max count.

questions.title: Remove Trailing Zeros From a String
questions.question: Remove trailing zeros from numeric string.
questions.answer: Find last index where char != '0', return substring.

questions.title: Determine if String Halves Are Alike
questions.question: Check if both halves have same number of vowels.
questions.answer: Count vowels in first half and second half, compare.

questions.title: Intersection of Multiple Arrays
questions.question: Given 2D array, return intersection of all subarrays.
questions.answer: Start with set of first array, intersect with each subsequent array using retainAll.

questions.title: Remove Palindromic Subsequences
questions.question: String only a and b. Remove palindromic subsequence (not substring). Return min steps to empty.
questions.answer: If empty -> 0, if palindrome -> 1, else 2.

questions.title: Longest Nice Substring
questions.question: Nice substring has both uppercase and lowercase of each letter. Return longest (or first).
questions.answer: Divide and conquer: find chars missing pair, split, recurse.

questions.title: Minimum Difference Between Highest and Lowest of K Scores
questions.question: Choose k scores, minimize difference between max and min.
questions.answer: Sort, slide window of size k, compute diff = nums[i+k-1]-nums[i], track min.

questions.title: Find All K-Distant Indices in an Array
questions.question: For each occurrence of key, add indices within k distance.
questions.answer: Find all indices of key, for each, add range [i-k, i+k] to set.

questions.title: Count of Matches in Tournament
questions.question: Number of matches in tournament where n teams, each match eliminates one. Return total matches = n-1.
questions.answer: n-1. Or simulate: matches = floor(n/2), n = ceil(n/2).

questions.title: Find the Winner of the Circular Game
questions.question: Josephus problem: n friends, eliminate every kth. Return last remaining (1-indexed).
questions.answer: Josephus: f(1)=0, f(n) = (f(n-1)+k)%n. Return +1.

questions.title: Maximum Population Year
questions.question: Given births and deaths, find year with max population.
questions.answer: Difference array on [birth, death), prefix sum, find max index.
relevant_options: Use map of year to delta

questions.title: Check if Number Has Equal Digit Count and Digit Value
questions.question: For digit i, count of i in string should equal digit at position i.
questions.answer: Count frequencies, compare freq[i] == num[i] for all i.
relevant_options: Use map of char to int

questions.title: Maximum Element After Decreasing and Rearranging
questions.question: Rearrange array such that arr[0]=1, each adjacent diff <=1, and each <= original. Maximize last element.
questions.answer: Sort, set arr[0]=1, for i: arr[i] = min(arr[i], arr[i-1]+1).

questions.title: Minimum Number of Operations to Make String Sorted
questions.question: Given string, find min operations (swap adjacent) to sort? Or find Lexicographic rank?
questions.answer: Lexicographic rank with factorial number system (mod answer).

questions.title: Maximum Score From Removing Substrings
questions.question: Remove 'AB' or 'BA' for points, maximize total.
questions.answer: Two passes depending on which gives more points, using stack.
relevant_options: Greedy always remove higher value first

questions.title: Find Kth Bit in Nth Binary String
questions.question: S1='0', Si=Si-1 + '1' + reverse(invert(Si-1)). Find kth bit.
questions.answer: Recursion: length=2^n-1. If mid, return '1'. If left, recursively find. If right, invert and reverse index.
relevant_options: Generate string fully (up to n=20) then index

questions.title: Minimum Time to Make Rope Colorful
questions.question: Remove balloons (letters) to avoid consecutive same colors, with removal costs. Min total cost.
questions.answer: Group consecutives, keep max cost in group, sum rest.

questions.title: Count Ways to Build Good Strings
questions.question: Build strings from zeros and ones with lengths between low and high, using zero length zero and one length one.
questions.answer: DP: dp[i] = dp[i-zero] + dp[i-one]. Sum dp[low..high].

questions.title: K Radius Subarray Averages
questions.question: Average of subarray centered at i with radius k, -1 if not enough elements.
questions.answer: Compute prefix sums. For i in [k, n-k-1], avg = (pref[i+k+1]-pref[i-k])/(2k+1).

questions.title: Closest Subsequence Sum
questions.question: Find subset sum closest to goal.
questions.answer: Split array, generate all subset sums for both halves, sort one half, binary search for complement.

questions.title: Minimum Cost to Cut a Stick
questions.question: Cut stick of length n at given positions, cost = length of stick being cut. Min total cost.
questions.answer: Add 0 and n to cuts, sort. DP[i][j] = min cost to cut between cuts[i] and cuts[j].

questions.title: Longest Subarray of 1's After Deleting One Element
questions.question: Delete one element (could be 0 or 1) to maximize consecutive 1's.
questions.answer: Sliding window with at most one zero allowed.

questions.title: Minimum Operations to Reduce X to Zero
questions.question: Remove from left or right until sum equals x. Min removals.
questions.answer: Find longest subarray with sum = total - x (sliding window). Answer = n - maxLen.

questions.title: Check if a Parentheses String Can Be Valid
questions.question: String has '(' , ')' , and locked (1=fixed, 0=flexible). Check if valid parentheses possible.
questions.answer: Two passes: left to right treat flexible as open, check no negative; right to left treat as close.

questions.title: Put Marbles in Bags
questions.question: Partition array into k subarrays, cost = first+last element of each subarray. Min and max total cost difference.
questions.answer: Compute adjacent pair sums (arr[i]+arr[i+1]). For min pick k-1 smallest, for max pick k-1 largest.

questions.title: Maximum Number of Events That Can Be Attended II
questions.question: Attend up to k events with values, non-overlapping. Max value.
questions.answer: Sort events by end, DP[i][k] = max(DP[i-1][k], value_i + DP[prev][k-1]).

questions.title: Maximum Profit From Trading Stocks
questions.question: With transaction fee, maximize profit.
questions.answer: DP states: cash (no stock) and hold (with stock). Update each day.

questions.title: Minimum Swaps to Make a String Balanced
questions.question: String of equal [ and ], swap any two characters to make it balanced. Min swaps.
questions.answer: Pass through, track imbalance. When negative, swap fixes it. Answer = (max_imbalance+1)/2.

questions.title: Maximum Number of Visible Points
questions.question: Given points and angle, max points visible from location (including angle window).
questions.answer: Convert to angles, duplicate with +360, sort, sliding window of angle.

questions.title: Maximum Product of the Length of Two Palindromic Subsequences
questions.question: Find two non-overlapping palindromic subsequences maximizing product of lengths.
questions.answer: Bitmask enumeration of subsequences, check palindrome, store length, try pairs (mask1 & mask2 ==0).

questions.title: Remove All Occurrences of a Substring
questions.question: Repeatedly remove all occurrences of 'part' from string until none left.
questions.answer: Use stack to build result, when end matches part length, check and pop.

questions.title: Minimum Deletions to Make String Balanced
questions.question: Make string have all 'a's before 'b's. Min deletions.
questions.answer: Count total 'a's. Pass: keep track of seen 'b's and remaining 'a's. Min deletions = min(deleteB + remainingA).

questions.title: Maximum Number of Ways to Split an Array
questions.question: Split at index i such that sum(nums[0..i]) >= sum(nums[i+1..n-1]). Count splits.
questions.answer: Compute total sum, prefix sum, count if prefix*2 >= total (except last).

questions.title: Maximum Number of Weeks You Can Work
questions.question: N projects with milestones to complete, can't do same project in adjacent weeks. Max weeks.
questions.answer: If max > sum(others)+1, answer = 2*others+1 else sum all.

questions.title: Check if Move is Legal in Tic Tac Toe
questions.question: Given board (3x3) and a move, check if placing player's piece is legal.
questions.answer: Check turn (X goes first, countX == countO or countX == countO+1). Check if move is empty and player correct, and if move results in win/continue.

questions.title: Sum of Beauty of All Substrings
questions.question: Beauty = max frequency - min frequency (of characters in substring). Sum for all substrings.
questions.answer: For each start, maintain frequency, track max and min, add diff.
relevant_options: Use sliding window for each start

questions.title: Maximum Score from Card Points
questions.question: Pick card from either end to maximize sum of k cards.
questions.answer: Total sum - min sum of n-k contiguous cards.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Increments on Subarrays to Form a Target Array
questions.question: Start from zero array, increment contiguous subarray by 1 each operation. Min ops to reach target.
questions.answer: Answer = sum of positive diffs between consecutive elements (start from 0).

questions.title: Maximum Score Words Formed by Letters
questions.question: Given words, letters, and scores, form subset of words max score (each letter limited).
questions.answer: Backtracking or bitmask DP over words (max n=14).

questions.title: Largest Merge of Two Strings
questions.question: Merge two strings by picking larger (lexicographically) character from front of either. Return largest possible string.
questions.answer: At each step, compare remaining suffixes: if word1 > word2 pick from word1 else from word2.

questions.title: Longest Happy String
questions.question: Construct longest string with at most a 'a', b 'b', c 'c', no three consecutive same letters.
questions.answer: Greedy: always pick remaining char with highest count, but not same as last two.

questions.title: Minimum Difference in Sums After Removal of Elements
questions.question: Remove n elements from 3n array to leave 2n, min difference (sum first n - sum last n).
questions.answer: Prefix min top n from left, suffix max top n from right using heaps.

questions.title: Shortest Subarray with Sum at Least K
questions.question: Find shortest subarray with sum >= k (can be negative).
questions.answer: Prefix sums, monotonic deque storing increasing prefix sums.
relevant_options: Binary search on length (O(n log n))
Sliding window only works for positives

questions.title: Count Submatrices With All Ones
questions.question: Count submatrices with all 1's.
questions.answer: For each row, compute heights of consecutive 1's. Use monotonic stack to count subrectangles.
relevant_options: For each row, use histogram method

questions.title: Minimum Insertion Steps to Make a String Palindrome
questions.question: Min insertions to make string palindrome.
questions.answer: Length of string - LCS with reverse.

questions.title: Minimum Time to Complete Trips
questions.question: Given bus times, find min time to complete totalTrips.
questions.answer: Binary search on time, compute trips sum(time/t_i) >= totalTrips.

questions.title: Minimum Moves to Equal Array Elements II
questions.question: Min moves to make all equal by +/-1. Moves = sum absolute differences to median.
questions.answer: Sort, median, sum |nums[i]-median|.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Swaps to Make the Binary String Balanced
questions.question: Balanced binary string (equal 0s and 1s). Min adjacent swaps? Actually min swaps any positions?
questions.answer: Count mismatches where position i and n-1-i differ; swaps needed = mismatches/2? For balanced string.

questions.title: Number of Subarrays With Bounded Maximum
questions.question: Count subarrays where max element between left and right inclusive.
questions.answer: Count subarrays with max <= right, subtract those with max < left.

questions.title: Count Substrings That Differ by One Character
questions.question: Count substrings where s and t differ by exactly one character.
questions.answer: DP: dp[i][j] = length of common prefix ending at i,j. Similarly suffix. Then sum.
relevant_options: DP with prefix and suffix matches

questions.title: Maximum Earnings From Taxi
questions.question: Pick non-overlapping rides with profit (end-start+tip). Max earnings.
questions.answer: Sort rides by end, DP with binary search for previous non-overlapping.
relevant_options: Greedy by end time with heap

questions.title: Minimum Time to Remove All Cars
questions.question: Remove '1's (cars) from left or right, cost=1 each removal, or remove middle '1's cost=2? Actually remove contiguous section cost = length.
questions.answer: DP: prefix cost, suffix cost, combine. Or treat as remove no cost if contiguous.

questions.title: Count Number of Homogenous Substrings
questions.question: Count substrings with all same characters.
questions.answer: Group consecutive same chars, for run of length l, add l*(l+1)/2.

questions.title: Minimum Obstacle Removal to Reach Corner
questions.question: From (0,0) to (m-1,n-1) moving up/down/left/right over grid where 1=obstacle (cost 1) and 0=empty (cost 0). Find min cost.
questions.answer: 0-1 BFS with deque.
relevant_options: Binary search on cost with BFS

questions.title: Minimum Operations to Make a Subsequence
questions.question: Make target a subsequence of arr by appending at end. Min operations? Actually length of LCS?
questions.answer: Map target values to indices, compute LIS of mapped array arr.

questions.title: Minimum Absolute Sum Difference
questions.question: Replace one element in nums1 to minimize sum |nums1[i]-nums2[i]|.
questions.answer: Sort nums1, for each i, find closest to nums2[i] in sorted nums1, compute improvement.

questions.title: Count Triplets That Can Form Two Arrays of Equal XOR
questions.question: Count triplets (i,j,k) where XOR i..j-1 == XOR j..k.
questions.answer: XOR property: prefix XOR. Condition prefix[i]==prefix[k+1]. For same prefix, any j between i+1..k works.

questions.title: Minimum Space Wasted From Packaging
questions.question: Assign packages to boxes, minimize wasted space (box size - package size). Each package must go to same or larger box.
questions.answer: Sort packages, for each box size, binary search fit, compute sum of differences.

questions.title: Maximum Number of Consecutive Values You Can Make
questions.question: Starting from 0, using coins of denominations, find max consecutive values you can make from 1 upwards.
questions.answer: Sort coins, if coin <= current_max+1, current_max+=coin else break.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Frogs Croaking
questions.question: Each frog says 'croak' in order. Count min frogs to produce given string.
questions.answer: Track counts of c, r, o, a, k. If any negative, invalid. Answer = max count of c at any time.

questions.title: Minimum Cost to Make Array Equal
questions.question: Cost to change nums[i] to target is abs(nums[i]-target)*cost[i]. Find target minimizing cost.
questions.answer: Weighted median of nums with costs as weights.

questions.title: Max Sum of Rectangle No Larger Than K
questions.question: Find max sum of any rectangle with sum <= k.
questions.answer: For each top/bottom row pair, compress columns to prefix sums, use TreeSet for cumulative sums.

questions.title: Minimum Skips to Arrive at Meeting On Time
questions.question: Travel distances at speed, can skip rest (hour integer division). Min skips to not exceed time.
questions.answer: DP[i][j] = min time to reach i with j skips, using fractional time handling.

questions.title: Minimum Time Difference
questions.question: Given time points in 'HH:MM', find min difference in minutes.
questions.answer: Convert to minutes, sort, compute circular diff, track min.

questions.title: Stone Game VII
questions.question: Alice and Bob remove from ends, score = sum removed. Alice max her score minus Bob's.
questions.answer: DP[i][j] = max difference for current player on subarray i..j = max(stones[i] + min(dp[i+2][j],dp[i+1][j-1]), ...).

questions.title: Maximum Area of a Piece of Cake After Horizontal and Vertical Cuts
questions.question: Max area after cutting at given positions horizontally and vertically.
questions.answer: Find max gap between consecutive cuts (including edges) for horizontal and vertical, multiply mod.

questions.title: Delete Columns to Make Sorted III
questions.question: Delete min columns so each row is lexicographically non-decreasing.
questions.answer: DP: find length of longest increasing subsequence of columns (consider entire column as whole string).

questions.title: Minimum Flips to Make a OR b Equal to c
questions.question: Flip bits in a or b (0->1,1->0) to make a|b==c. Min flips.
questions.answer: For each bit: if c bit 0, need (a bit,b bit) = (0,0): flips = a_bit+b_bit. If c bit 1, need at least one 1: if both 0, 1 flip else 0.

questions.title: Minimum Insertions to Balance a Parentheses String
questions.question: Each open needs two closes '))' to balance. Min insertions.
questions.answer: Track need for close. If '(', need+=2. If need odd, add one close. If ')', need--. Count insertions.
relevant_options: Count needed close at each step

questions.title: Number of Pairs of Strings With Concatenation Equal to Target
questions.question: Count pairs (i!=j) where nums[i]+nums[j] == target.
questions.answer: Count frequencies. For each string, check target if starts with it, then suffix must exist.

questions.title: Minimum Deletions to Make Character Frequencies Unique
questions.question: Delete chars so all frequencies unique. Min deletions.
questions.answer: Count frequencies, sort descending, greedy: keep freq, if seen, reduce until new unique.

questions.title: Find the Longest Valid Obstacle Course at Each Position
questions.question: For each position i, length of longest non-decreasing subsequence ending at i (with patience sorting variant).
questions.answer: Patience sorting but use upper_bound for non-decreasing (allow equal).

questions.title: Maximum Number of Groups Getting Fresh Donuts
questions.question: Batch size batchSize, groups with sizes. Max groups happy (remainder 0) by ordering.
questions.answer: State: count of groups for each remainder (0..batchSize-1). DP with memoization.
relevant_options: Reduce by batchSize for large groups

questions.title: Minimum Number of Days to Disconnect Island
questions.question: Min days (flipping 1 to 0) to disconnect island (more than one island or zero).
questions.answer: If already disconnected ->0, if one articulation point ->1, else 2.

questions.title: Maximum Value at a Given Index in a Bounded Array
questions.question: Construct array length n, maxSum, at index index maximize value, adjacent diff <=1, all positive.
questions.answer: Binary search on value, compute min sum for that peak using arithmetic series.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Operations to Reinitialize a Permutation
questions.question: Operation: perm[i] = perm[i/2] if i even, perm[(n+i-1)/2] if i odd. Steps to return to original.
questions.answer: Simulate pointer position for element originally at index 1 (or any) until returns.

questions.title: Smallest Subarrays With Maximum Bitwise OR
questions.question: For each i, smallest j>=i such that OR i..j is maximum possible from i.
questions.answer: From right, maintain bits found; use binary search or sliding window?
relevant_options: Use last occurrence of each bit

questions.title: Count Ways to Make Array With Product
questions.question: Count arrays length n with positive integers where product = k.
questions.answer: Factorize k into primes. For each prime exponent e, ways = C(e+n-1, n-1) stars and bars. Multiply.

questions.title: Minimum Operations to Make Array Equal
questions.question: In one operation: add 1 to n-1 elements (or subtract 1 from one). Min ops to make all equal.
questions.answer: Ops = sum of (nums[i] - min) ? Actually problem variant: min ops to make all equal by incrementing n-1 = sum - n*min.

questions.title: Count Square Submatrices with All Ones
questions.question: Count submatrices that are squares with all 1's.
questions.answer: DP[i][j] = min(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1], dp[i-1][j-1]) + 1 if grid[i][j]==1. Sum all dp[i][j].
relevant_options: For each cell, expand possible side
Prefix sum and binary search side

questions.title: Maximum Points You Can Obtain from Cards
questions.question: Pick from either end, max points with k cards.
questions.answer: Total sum - min sum of n-k contiguous subarray.

questions.title: Maximum Number of Non-Overlapping Subarrays With Sum Equals Target
questions.question: Max number of non-overlapping subarrays with sum = target.
questions.answer: Greedy: prefix sums map, if prefix-current-target seen, count++ and reset map.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Work Sessions to Finish the Tasks
questions.question: Each session max sessionTime, schedule all tasks. Min sessions.
questions.answer: Bitmask DP: dp[mask] = min sessions, within each try to pack tasks.

questions.title: Sum of Subarray Ranges
questions.question: Sum of (max - min) over all subarrays.
questions.answer: Sum of max subarrays - sum of min subarrays using monotonic stacks.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Taps to Open to Water a Garden
questions.question: Taps at positions i covering [i-range[i], i+range[i]]. Min taps to cover [0,n].
questions.answer: Transform to intervals, sort by start, greedy select farthest reach.

questions.title: Longest Subsequence With Limited Sum
questions.question: For each query, find length of longest subsequence (not necessarily contiguous) with sum <= query.
questions.answer: Sort array, compute prefix sums, binary search for each query.

questions.title: Minimum Cost to Reach Destination in Time
questions.question: Graph with passing fees, each edge takes time. Min fee to reach dest within maxTime.
questions.answer: DP[time][node] = min cost to reach node at exact time.

questions.title: Number of Ways to Reorder Array to Get Same BST
questions.question: Count permutations that yield same BST as given array (first element is root).
questions.answer: Recursive: ways(left)*ways(right)*C(len(left)+len(right), len(left)).

questions.title: Maximum Number of Tasks You Can Assign
questions.question: Tasks and workers, each worker can do one task if strength >= task, or with pill (strength+pillStrength) but pill once. Max tasks.
questions.answer: Binary search on k, assign k hardest tasks to k strongest workers with pill option.

questions.title: Minimum Time to Make Array Non-Decreasing
questions.question: In operation, set nums[i] = max(nums[i], nums[i+1]) simultaneously. Min seconds to make non-decreasing.
questions.answer: Binary search on answer, simulate from left and validate.

questions.title: Count Number of Ways to Place Houses
questions.question: Place houses on 2 sides of road, no adjacent on same side. Count ways (dp with state).
questions.answer: dp[i][0/1][0/1] for each side. Or compute Fibonacci-like. (F(n+2))^2.

questions.title: Minimum Number of Removals to Make Mountain Array
questions.question: Min removals to make mountain array (strict inc then dec).
questions.answer: LIS from left and right, find max inc[i]+dec[i]-1. Answer = n-max.

questions.title: Maximum Performance of a Team
questions.question: Choose k engineers with sum speed * min efficiency. Max performance.
questions.answer: Sort by efficiency descending, maintain min-heap of speeds of size k, sum speeds, track max.

questions.title: Maximum Number of Eaten Apples
questions.question: Each day new apples (apples[i]) rot on day rot[i]. Eat one apple per day. Max eaten.
questions.answer: Min-heap of (rotten day, apples), eat earliest rotting, skip rotten.

questions.title: Maximum Absolute Sum of Any Subarray
questions.question: Max absolute subarray sum (|sum|).
questions.answer: Max subarray sum and min subarray sum, answer = max(|maxSum|, |minSum|).

questions.title: Minimum Time to Type Word Using Special Typewriter
questions.question: Typewriter circular a-z, pointer starts at 'a', cost 1 per move or 1 to type. Min time.
questions.answer: For each char, min distance = min(|curr-target|, 26-|curr-target|). Sum + n.

questions.title: Count Number of Maximum Bitwise-OR Subsets
questions.question: Count subsets with OR equal to maximum possible OR.
questions.answer: Find max OR, then DP or backtracking count subsets with OR == maxOr.

questions.title: Minimum Operations to Make the Array Alternating
questions.question: Change elements to make array alternating (adjacent different). Min changes.
questions.answer: Separate even/odd indices, find top 2 frequencies; if different pick both, else pick best combination.

questions.title: Maximum Points You Can Obtain from Cards
questions.question: Pick k cards from start or end. Max sum.
questions.answer: Total sum - min sum of n-k contiguous subarray.

questions.title: Next Greater Element I
questions.question: Next greater element for subset of array.
questions.answer: Monotonic decreasing stack for nums2, map element to next greater.

questions.title: Next Greater Element II (Circular)
questions.question: Next greater element in circular array.
questions.answer: Double the array conceptually, monotonic stack on indices % n.

questions.title: Daily Temperatures
questions.question: For each day, days until warmer temperature.
questions.answer: Monotonic decreasing stack storing indices.

questions.title: Online Stock Span
questions.question: Design class that returns span of stock price (consecutive days <= current price).
questions.answer: Monotonic decreasing stack of (price, span).
